requirements.title: Function length limit
requirements.text: The tool shall detect and report C functions exceeding the configured max_function_lines threshold.

requirements.title: Function naming convention
requirements.text: The tool shall support naming-convention analysis for C functions.

requirements.title: No goto
requirements.text: The tool shall detect and report use of the goto keyword in C source files.

requirements.title: Goto absence verification
requirements.text: The tool shall confirm absence of goto when none is present.

requirements.title: Dynamic memory prohibition
requirements.text: The tool shall detect use of malloc, calloc, realloc, and free and report them as prohibited.

requirements.title: Memory function variants
requirements.text: The tool shall detect all variants of dynamic allocation including strdup and aligned_alloc.

requirements.title: Recursion detection
requirements.text: The tool shall detect and report direct self-recursion in C functions.

requirements.title: Preprocessor undef prohibition
requirements.text: The tool shall detect and report use of #undef preprocessor directives.

requirements.title: Non-local jump prohibition
requirements.text: The tool shall detect and report use of setjmp and longjmp.

requirements.title: Non-local jump absence
requirements.text: The tool shall confirm absence of setjmp/longjmp when none is present.

requirements.title: Mutable static prohibition
requirements.text: The tool shall detect mutable file-scope static variables and report them.

requirements.title: Void pointer prohibition
requirements.text: The tool shall detect and report use of void* in function parameters and return types.

requirements.title: Pragma usage detection
requirements.text: The tool shall detect and report use of #pragma directives.

requirements.title: errno usage detection
requirements.text: The tool shall detect and report direct use of the errno global variable.

requirements.title: Buffer copy bounds check
requirements.text: The tool shall detect use of unbounded string copy functions (strcpy, strcat, memcpy, memmove, strncpy, strncat).

requirements.title: Format string injection
requirements.text: The tool shall detect calls to printf-family functions with non-literal format strings.

requirements.title: OS command injection
requirements.text: The tool shall detect calls to system, popen, execl, execv and variants with non-literal arguments.

requirements.title: NULL dereference after allocation
requirements.text: The tool shall detect malloc/calloc followed by pointer dereference without null check.

requirements.title: Integer overflow in allocation
requirements.text: The tool shall detect multiplication expressions passed directly to malloc/calloc that may overflow.

requirements.title: Use-after-free prevention
requirements.text: The tool shall detect free() calls and warn that the pointer must be nulled immediately after.

requirements.title: Double-free detection
requirements.text: The tool shall detect two free() calls on the same line (double-free pattern).

requirements.title: Insecure temp file creation
requirements.text: The tool shall detect use of tmpnam, tempnam, and mktemp for insecure temporary file creation.

requirements.title: Broken cryptographic algorithm
requirements.text: The tool shall detect use of broken cryptographic primitives including MD5, DES, RC4, and SHA1.

requirements.title: Dangerous function prohibition
requirements.text: The tool shall detect use of gets, getpwd, mktemp, and strtok.

requirements.title: Crypto library coverage
requirements.text: The tool shall detect broken crypto API usage across OpenSSL and libgcrypt.

requirements.title: Buffer overflow risk completeness
requirements.text: The tool shall detect all OWASP Top 10 buffer copy patterns.

requirements.title: Format string completeness
requirements.text: The tool shall detect dprintf in addition to printf/fprintf/syslog.

requirements.title: Command injection completeness
requirements.text: The tool shall detect execlp and execvp in addition to execl and execv.

requirements.title: Alloc overflow completeness
requirements.text: The tool shall detect custom allocator functions ending in alloc.

requirements.title: Broken crypto completeness — SHA1
requirements.text: The tool shall detect SHA1 API usage as a broken algorithm.

requirements.title: Temp file completeness
requirements.text: The tool shall detect tempnam in addition to tmpnam and mktemp.

requirements.title: Dangerous function completeness
requirements.text: The tool shall detect getpwd usage.

requirements.title: Unsafe string function detection
requirements.text: The tool shall detect calls to strcpy, strcat, sprintf, gets, and scanf as unsafe string functions.

requirements.title: Unchecked allocation
requirements.text: The tool shall detect malloc/calloc/realloc calls whose return value is not checked for NULL.

requirements.title: Signed/unsigned comparison
requirements.text: The tool shall detect comparisons of signed integers with sizeof (unsigned).

requirements.title: Integer boundary constants
requirements.text: The tool shall detect use of INT_MAX, INT_MIN, UINT_MAX without guard conditions.

requirements.title: Assert in production code
requirements.text: The tool shall detect assert() at line start and warn that it may be compiled out in release.

requirements.title: Pointer arithmetic
requirements.text: The tool shall detect pointer arithmetic using +=/-=/++/-- combined with dereferencing.

requirements.title: Unchecked system call
requirements.text: The tool shall detect bare calls to fopen, fclose, fread, fwrite, read, write, open, close, connect, bind, and listen without return value check.

requirements.title: Unsafe function coverage completeness
requirements.text: The tool shall detect vsprintf and wcscat as unsafe.

requirements.title: System call coverage completeness
requirements.text: The tool shall detect listen, connect, bind calls.

requirements.title: ASIL QM determination
requirements.text: The tool shall compute ASIL QM for severity S1, exposure E1, controllability C1 per ISO 26262-3:2018 Table 4.

requirements.title: ASIL-A determination
requirements.text: The tool shall compute ASIL-A for appropriate S/E/C combinations per ISO 26262-3:2018 Table 4.

requirements.title: ASIL-B determination
requirements.text: The tool shall compute ASIL-B for appropriate S/E/C combinations per ISO 26262-3:2018 Table 4.

requirements.title: ASIL-C determination
requirements.text: The tool shall compute ASIL-C for appropriate S/E/C combinations per ISO 26262-3:2018 Table 4.

requirements.title: ASIL-D determination
requirements.text: The tool shall compute ASIL-D for S3/E4/C3 and S3/E4/C2 per ISO 26262-3:2018 Table 4.

requirements.title: HARA input validation
requirements.text: The tool shall return an error when any of S, E, or C parameters are missing or zero.

requirements.title: HARA out-of-range tolerance
requirements.text: The tool shall return QM (not error) for S/E/C values outside the valid range.

requirements.title: HARA file initialisation
requirements.text: The tool shall create a .cfusa-hara.json skeleton when hara init is invoked.

requirements.title: HARA help interface
requirements.text: The tool shall print usage information when --help is passed to the hara command.

requirements.title: Configuration defaults
requirements.text: The tool shall initialise a configuration with safe default values when cfusa_config_defaults is called.

requirements.title: Configuration save and load
requirements.text: The tool shall save configuration to .cfusa.json and reload it with equivalent values.

requirements.title: Missing configuration file
requirements.text: The tool shall return non-zero when attempting to load a configuration from a non-existent directory.

requirements.title: Malformed configuration tolerance
requirements.text: The tool shall not crash when loading a malformed .cfusa.json file.

requirements.title: Directory exclusion
requirements.text: The tool shall exclude source files under configured exclude_dirs from all scanning operations.

requirements.title: Strict mode flag
requirements.text: The tool shall persist and reload the strict configuration flag correctly.

requirements.title: Report initialisation
requirements.text: The tool shall initialise a report with zero findings and zero counts.

requirements.title: Finding addition
requirements.text: The tool shall correctly add findings with rule_id, category, severity, file, line, and message.

requirements.title: Safety score computation
requirements.text: The tool shall compute a safety score in the range [0,100], returning 100 for empty reports.

requirements.title: Severity string rendering
requirements.text: The tool shall render severity levels as uppercase strings ERROR, WARNING, and INFO.

requirements.title: Report format parsing
requirements.text: The tool shall parse format strings json, sarif, text, html, and md into format enum values.

requirements.title: Report output formats
requirements.text: The tool shall print reports in text, JSON, SARIF, and Markdown formats without crashing.

requirements.title: Report file writing
requirements.text: The tool shall write a report to a specified file path and return 0 on success.

requirements.title: Report HTML format
requirements.text: The tool shall output valid HTML when the html format is requested.

requirements.title: Rule registry reset
requirements.text: The tool shall clear all registered rules when cfusa_engine_reset is called.

requirements.title: Category-filtered execution
requirements.text: The tool shall only execute rules matching the requested category.

requirements.title: Multi-category execution
requirements.text: The tool shall accumulate findings from multiple category passes into a single report.

requirements.title: Empty directory handling
requirements.text: The tool shall return zero findings for empty or non-existent source directories.

requirements.title: Rule listing
requirements.text: The tool shall list registered rules without crashing via cfusa_engine_list_rules.

requirements.title: String match outside string literal
requirements.text: cfusa_match_outside_string shall return 1 when the token appears outside string literals.

requirements.title: String match inside literal suppression
requirements.text: cfusa_match_outside_string shall return 0 when the token only appears inside string literals.

requirements.title: String match escaped quote handling
requirements.text: cfusa_match_outside_string shall correctly handle backslash-escaped quotes within string literals.

requirements.title: Walk sources vendor exclusion
requirements.text: cfusa_walk_sources shall skip source files inside directories named vendor.

requirements.title: Walk sources build exclusion
requirements.text: cfusa_walk_sources shall skip source files inside directories named build.

requirements.title: Path basename extraction
requirements.text: cfusa_basename shall return the filename component of a path.

requirements.title: Path extension extraction
requirements.text: cfusa_extension shall return the file extension including the leading dot.

requirements.title: Path join
requirements.text: cfusa_path_join shall concatenate a directory and filename with a single path separator.

requirements.title: Line counting
requirements.text: cfusa_count_lines_in_file shall count the number of newline characters in a file.

requirements.title: C file counting
requirements.text: cfusa_count_c_files shall count .c files recursively in a directory.

requirements.title: SHA-256 buffer hashing
requirements.text: cfusa_sha256_buf shall compute the SHA-256 hash of a byte buffer and return hex.

requirements.title: SHA-256 file hashing
requirements.text: cfusa_sha256_file shall compute the SHA-256 hash of a file on disk.

requirements.title: ISO 8601 timestamp
requirements.text: cfusa_timestamp_now shall return a non-empty ISO 8601 timestamp string containing T.

requirements.title: Trace help
requirements.text: The trace command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Trace annotation scanning
requirements.text: The trace command shall scan //cfusa:req and //cfusa:test annotations without crashing.

requirements.title: Trace empty source
requirements.text: The trace command shall not crash when no annotations are present.

requirements.title: Trace gaps flag
requirements.text: The trace command shall accept --gaps and report requirements without test coverage.

requirements.title: Disposition list empty
requirements.text: The disposition list command shall not crash when no dispositions file exists.

requirements.title: Disposition add
requirements.text: The disposition add command shall create a .cfusa-dispositions.json entry.

requirements.title: Disposition list after add
requirements.text: The disposition list command shall return 0 after a successful add.

requirements.title: Init creates config
requirements.text: The init command shall create .cfusa.json in the specified directory.

requirements.title: Init help
requirements.text: The init command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Check command
requirements.text: The check command shall run all rule categories and return 0 on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Release help
requirements.text: The release command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Release runs
requirements.text: The release command shall not crash when invoked on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Qualify help
requirements.text: The qualify command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Qualify runs
requirements.text: The qualify command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Safety case runs
requirements.text: The safety_case command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Sign help
requirements.text: The sign command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: ISO 26262 help
requirements.text: The iso26262 command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: IEC 61508 help
requirements.text: The iec61508 command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: MISRA help
requirements.text: The misra command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Audit pack runs
requirements.text: The audit_pack command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Diff help
requirements.text: The diff command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Badge runs
requirements.text: The badge command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Req list
requirements.text: The req list command shall not crash when no requirements file exists.

requirements.title: Req help
requirements.text: The req command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: TARA output file
requirements.text: The tara command shall create a tara.json file in the target directory.

requirements.title: TARA help
requirements.text: The tara command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: TARA runs on empty dir
requirements.text: The tara command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: FMEA output file
requirements.text: The fmea command shall create a fmea.json file in the target directory.

requirements.title: FMEA runs on empty dir
requirements.text: The fmea command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Impact ref validation
requirements.text: The impact command shall reject git refs containing shell-injection characters.

requirements.title: Impact valid refs
requirements.text: The impact command shall accept valid branch names and SHA references.

requirements.title: Impact empty from rejected
requirements.text: The impact command shall reject an empty --from argument.

requirements.title: Vuln help
requirements.text: The vuln command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Vuln runs on empty dir
requirements.text: The vuln command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Vuln JSON format
requirements.text: The vuln command shall not crash when --format json is specified.

requirements.title: SCI help
requirements.text: The sci command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: SCI runs on empty dir
requirements.text: The sci command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Coverage help
requirements.text: The coverage command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Coverage runs on empty dir
requirements.text: The coverage command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: SAS help
requirements.text: The sas command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: SAS runs on empty dir
requirements.text: The sas command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Metrics help
requirements.text: The metrics command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Metrics runs on empty dir
requirements.text: The metrics command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Metrics JSON format
requirements.text: The metrics command shall not crash when --format json is specified.

requirements.title: PR help
requirements.text: The pr command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: PR runs on empty dir
requirements.text: The pr command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Hooks runs
requirements.text: The hooks command shall not crash when invoked without arguments.

requirements.title: Template help
requirements.text: The template command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Template runs on empty dir
requirements.text: The template command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Fix help
requirements.text: The fix command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Fix runs on empty dir
requirements.text: The fix command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: DO-178C help
requirements.text: The do178 command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Version output
requirements.text: The version command shall return 0 and print version information.

requirements.title: Boundary help
requirements.text: The boundary command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Boundary runs
requirements.text: The boundary command shall not crash on an empty directory.

requirements.title: Boundary analysis
requirements.text: The boundary command shall report on API boundary analysis.

requirements.title: Verify help
requirements.text: The verify command shall return 0 when --help is passed.

requirements.title: Verify runs
requirements.text: The verify command shall not crash on an empty directory.
